On October 22, 1962, US President John F. Kennedy executed a massive, historically defining, and absolutely terrifying geopolitical maneuver. In a highly dramatic, massive, globally televised address, he officially and aggressively announced that the United States had discovered massive, offensive Soviet nuclear missile sites heavily under construction in Cuba. He fiercely declared a strict, absolute naval "quarantine" (blockade) of the island, aggressively plunging the entire globe into the absolute, terrifying climax of the Cuban Missile Crisis, bringing the superpowers to the absolute brink of total thermonuclear war.

Following the massive, catastrophic collapse of French colonial authority across French Indochina, Laos fiercely established its massive, sovereign political architecture.
